items.summary: In `frontend/src/components/GameTimer.tsx`, update the timer text styling so that both the match countdown and the conquest countdown labels and time values are rendered in black color regardless of warning/critical state transitions. Ensure the pulsing warning (orange) and critical (red) states only affect background or border indicators, not the text color itself.

Add an 'End Turn' button to the game HUD in `frontend/src/pages/GamePage.tsx`. The button must be prominently visible during gameplay, styled consistently with the 16th-century parchment theme. When a human-controlled player clicks 'End Turn', the current player's turn is concluded and the game engine advances to the next player's turn (calling the appropriate turn-advance logic in `frontend/src/hooks/useGameEngine.ts`). The button should be disabled or hidden when it is not the local human player's turn (e.g., during bot turns or animations).
